submitted_payload.description: Ralph Workflow is an open-source AI orchestration system for running persistent digital-human agents that own real work across chat, files, tooling, automation, and browser tasks. Primary repo: Codeberg. GitHub mirror available for reach, but Codeberg is the canonical home.

verification.execution_method: Direct unauthenticated POST to the live public Tally endpoint discovered from the AIMarketing.Directory submit page.
verification.canonicalization_note: The submitted Codeberg URL https://codeberg.org/mistlight/Ralph-Workflow resolves to the canonical org repo https://codeberg.org/RalphWorkflow/Ralph-Workflow.

why_this_action: The May 23, 2026 audit still shows distribution-to-Codeberg conversion as the bottleneck, so a fresh executable directory lane is higher leverage than more drafting.
AIMarketing.Directory was not yet in outreach-log.md, exposed a live public submit form, and accepted a real submission without auth or CAPTCHA from this environment.
The submission copy explicitly positioned Codeberg as canonical and GitHub as mirror-only context.
expected_outcome: Qualified developers searching AI tooling and agent orchestration directories discover Ralph Workflow through a fresh listing that routes to the canonical Codeberg repo.
replacement_condition: If there is no live AI Marketing Directory listing or referral evidence by the backlink review date, treat this lane as pending-only and spend the next fresh-action slot on another untouched autonomous submit host.

changes: added AIMarketing.Directory as a tracked easy-submit lane at https://www.aimarketing.directory/submit
registered aimarketing.directory as a validated autonomous submit host backed by a working public Tally endpoint
